headline: NVIDIA's Compensation Committee adopted the Fiscal Year 2027 Variable Compensation Plan, establishing revenue-based cash bonus targets for key executive officers.
investor_impact: The establishment of revenue-based performance goals for FY2027 ensures management remains incentivized to drive top-line growth. This is a standard corporate governance procedure and does not materially alter our fundamental outlook or investment thesis for the company.
key_figures: Jen-Hsun Huang target award: $4,000,000 (200% of base salary)
Colette M. Kress target award: $1,500,000 (150% of base salary)
Ajay K. Puri target award: $1,500,000 (150% of base salary)
Debora Shoquist target award: $1,500,000 (150% of base salary)
Timothy S. Teter target award: $1,500,000 (150% of base salary)
